info.name: Track. API Collection
info.description: API collection for testing the Multi-Project Task Tracker application. Handles authentication, project CRUD, task CRUD, and Windows startup settings. Note: Cookie-based sessions are used. Log in first, and Postman will automatically send the session cookie on subsequent requests.

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Registers a new user and initializes their empty profile database inside the `data/` directory.
Authenticates user credentials, generates a session token, and responds with a `session_token` cookie. Subsequent requests in Postman will automatically include this cookie.
Retrieves user details corresponding to the active session cookie. Verifies that user is successfully logged in.
Clears the active session from the server and deletes the local `session_token` cookie.

item.description: Endpoints to manage user logins, signups, logs and sessions.

item.name: Projects

request.description: Gets all projects and associated tasks belonging to the currently logged in user.
Creates a new project item in the logged-in user's file workspace.

variable.description: The unique UUID of the project

request.description: Modifies project metadata such as title, descriptions, websites, and repos.

variable.description: The unique UUID of the project

request.description: Deletes the project along with all tasks inside it from the user's data file.

item.description: Endpoints to manage project workspace elements.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Implement Stripe Checkout",
    "description": "Integrate checkout button on frontend and configure webhook on backend.",
    "status": "todo",
    "priority": "high",
    "scheduleDate": "2026-06-16T09:00",
    "deadline": "2026-06-25T17:00",
    "reminder": true,
    "recurring": "weekly",
    "subtasks": [
        { "id": "s1", "text": "Setup Stripe account", "completed": false },
        { "id": "s2", "text": "Implement client UI checkout button", "completed": false }
    ],
    "timeLogged": 0,
    "timeSessions": [],
    "timerStarted": null,
    "pomodoroSessions": []
}

variable.description: The unique UUID of the target project

request.description: Appends a new task item to a specific project. Tasks support custom descriptions, statuses ('todo', 'in-progress', 'done'), priorities ('low', 'medium', 'high'), deadlines, and alarm reminder parameters.

variable.description: The unique UUID of the project
The unique UUID of the task

request.description: Modifies task attributes. Can be used for standard title edits, moving task columns (changing status), or rescheduling deadlines.
Deletes the specified task from the target project.
Returns whether the hidden Windows Startup VBScript shortcut file exists in the Windows Startup directory.
Configures startup: if true, backend dynamically creates the VBScript file in `%APPDATA%/Microsoft/Windows/Start Menu/Programs/Startup`. If false, removes it.
